ClaySharp
Table of Contents

Class ClayNative

Namespace
ClaySharp.Interop
Assembly
BlackHook.ClaySharp.dll

Provides low-level, high-performance C# bindings to the native Clay layout library. Uses source-generated marshalling via LibraryImportAttribute and compiles with runtime marshalling disabled for zero-overhead, direct native transitions.

public static class ClayNative
Inheritance
object
ClayNative
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Remarks

Clay is a single-header C library for high-performance 2D layout. This class provides the direct interop wrapper. Since runtime marshalling is disabled, all parameters and return types are marshaled at compile-time by the C# compiler. Unsafe pointers are utilized heavily; developers must ensure correct lifetime management of memory backings and arenas.

Methods

BeginLayout()

Begins a new layout pass. Must be called every frame before declaring UI elements.

public static extern void BeginLayout()

Clay_Initialize(Arena, Dimensions, ErrorHandler)

Initializes the native Clay layout engine context with a memory arena, initial window dimensions, and an error handler.

public static extern Context* Clay_Initialize(Arena arena, Dimensions layoutDimensions, ErrorHandler errorHandler)

Parameters

arena Arena

The allocated memory arena for Clay's internal structures.

layoutDimensions Dimensions

The initial width and height of the layout viewport.

errorHandler ErrorHandler

The error handler callback and user data to receive error notifications.

Returns

Context*

A raw pointer to the initialized internal Context structure.

CloseElement()

Low-level function: closes the current active layout element scope.

public static extern void CloseElement()

ConfigureOpenElement(ElementDeclaration)

Low-level function: configures the currently open layout element with the provided styling declarations.

public static extern void ConfigureOpenElement(ElementDeclaration config)

Parameters

config ElementDeclaration

The configuration parameters for the element.

ConfigureOpenElementPtr(in ElementDeclaration)

Low-level function: configures the currently open layout element passing a reference to avoid structure copy.

public static void ConfigureOpenElementPtr(in ElementDeclaration config)

Parameters

config ElementDeclaration

A reference to the configuration parameters.

CreateArenaWithCapacityAndMemory(nuint, void*)

Creates a memory allocation arena using a pre-allocated block of raw unmanaged memory.

public static extern Arena CreateArenaWithCapacityAndMemory(nuint capacity, void* memory)

Parameters

capacity nuint

The capacity of the memory backing in bytes. Usually obtained via MinMemorySize().

memory void*

A raw pointer to the block of unmanaged memory allocated for Clay.

Returns

Arena

A initialized Arena struct ready to be passed to initialization.

EndLayout()

Concludes the current layout pass, computes alignments, sizes, and positions, and returns the resulting rendering commands.

public static extern RenderCommandArray EndLayout()

Returns

RenderCommandArray

A RenderCommandArray containing the drawing operations to perform for the frame.

GetCurrentContext()

Gets a pointer to the active, thread-local Clay layout context.

public static extern Context* GetCurrentContext()

Returns

Context*

A pointer to the current Context, or null if none is active.

GetElementData(ElementId)

Retrieves calculated layout details (such as the computed bounding box) for a specific element.

public static extern ElementData GetElementData(ElementId id)

Parameters

id ElementId

The unique ID of the element.

Returns

ElementData

An ElementData structure containing layout metadata.

GetElementId(ClayString)

Computes a unique element ID from a descriptive ID string.

public static extern ElementId GetElementId(ClayString idString)

Parameters

idString ClayString

The string key identifying the element.

Returns

ElementId

A unique ElementId for element declarations.

GetElementIdWithIndex(ClayString, uint)

Computes a unique element ID from a descriptive ID string and an index (e.g. inside loops).

public static extern ElementId GetElementIdWithIndex(ClayString idString, uint index)

Parameters

idString ClayString

The base string key identifying the collection.

index uint

An integer loop index to guarantee uniqueness.

Returns

ElementId

A unique indexed ElementId.

GetMaxElementCount()

Gets the maximum number of UI elements that can be stored in the layout tree.

public static extern int GetMaxElementCount()

Returns

int

The maximum element capacity.

GetMaxMeasureTextCacheWordCount()

Gets the maximum capacity of the word cache used during text measurement.

public static extern int GetMaxMeasureTextCacheWordCount()

Returns

int

The word cache capacity.

GetParentElementId()

Retrieves the unique integer ID of the currently open parent element.

public static extern uint GetParentElementId()

Returns

uint

The parent element's ID value.

GetPointerOverIds()

Retrieves an array of all layout element IDs that the pointer is currently positioned over.

public static extern ElementIdArray GetPointerOverIds()

Returns

ElementIdArray

An array slice of ElementId structs representing the hovered hierarchy.

GetScrollContainerData(ElementId)

Retrieves scroll offset and container dimensions for a scrollable layout element.

public static extern ScrollContainerData GetScrollContainerData(ElementId id)

Parameters

id ElementId

The unique ID of the scroll container element.

Returns

ScrollContainerData

A ScrollContainerData structure containing scroll state.

GetScrollOffset()

Gets the current active scroll offset accumulated for scroll containers.

public static extern Vector2 GetScrollOffset()

Returns

Vector2

A Vector2 representing the horizontal and vertical scroll offsets.

HashString(ClayString, uint, uint)

Generates a unique layout ID based on a string key and hashing parameters.

public static extern ElementId HashString(ClayString key, uint offset, uint seed)

Parameters

key ClayString

The source string to hash.

offset uint

An offset index to append to avoid conflicts.

seed uint

A custom hashing seed value.

Returns

ElementId

A hashed ElementId structure.

Hovered()

Checks if any element in the active layout was hovered by the pointer during the current frame.

public static bool Hovered()

Returns

bool

True if a layout element is currently hovered; otherwise, false.

IsDebugModeEnabled()

Checks whether Clay's debug mode is currently active.

public static bool IsDebugModeEnabled()

Returns

bool

True if debugging is enabled; otherwise, false.

MinMemorySize()

Retrieves the minimum size in bytes of the memory backing required for Clay's internal allocator. Call this before allocating memory for the arena.

public static extern uint MinMemorySize()

Returns

uint

The minimum memory size in bytes.

OnHover(nint, nint)

Registers a global hover callback that is invoked when any element configured to trigger on-hover events is hovered.

public static extern void OnHover(nint onHoverFunction, nint userData)

Parameters

onHoverFunction nint

A function pointer to a method matching the ClayNative.OnHoverCallback signature.

userData nint

A custom unmanaged data pointer that will be supplied to the callback.

OpenElement()

Low-level function: opens a new layout element scope. Must be paired with a corresponding call to CloseElement().

public static extern void OpenElement()

OpenTextElement(ClayString, TextElementConfig*)

Low-level function: opens and declares a text element within the current parent scope.

public static extern void OpenTextElement(ClayString text, TextElementConfig* textConfig)

Parameters

text ClayString

The string text to display.

textConfig TextElementConfig*

A pointer to the text rendering style parameters.

PointerOver(ElementId)

Determines whether the pointer is currently positioned over a specific layout element.

public static bool PointerOver(ElementId elementId)

Parameters

elementId ElementId

The unique ID of the element to check.

Returns

bool

True if the pointer is hovering over the specified element; otherwise, false.

RenderCommandArray_Get(RenderCommandArray, int)

Helper: retrieves a pointer to a specific RenderCommand inside a RenderCommandArray at the specified index.

public static extern RenderCommand* RenderCommandArray_Get(RenderCommandArray array, int index)

Parameters

array RenderCommandArray

The list of render commands returned by EndLayout().

index int

The 0-based index of the command to retrieve.

Returns

RenderCommand*

A pointer to the render command structure, or null if the index is out of bounds.

ResetMeasureTextCache()

Resets the internal text measurement cache. Call this if fonts, sizes, or global zoom levels change.

public static extern void ResetMeasureTextCache()

SetCullingEnabled(bool)

Enables or disables viewport culling. When enabled, elements outside the visible viewport are excluded from rendering.

public static void SetCullingEnabled(bool enabled)

Parameters

enabled bool

True to enable clipping/culling; otherwise, false.

SetCurrentContext(Context*)

Sets the active, thread-local Clay layout context. Useful for multi-context architectures where multiple layout states are maintained.

public static extern void SetCurrentContext(Context* context)

Parameters

context Context*

A pointer to the Context to set as active.

SetDebugModeEnabled(bool)

Enables or disables the native Clay debugger overlay.

public static void SetDebugModeEnabled(bool enabled)

Parameters

enabled bool

True to enable debug mode; otherwise, false.

SetLayoutDimensions(Dimensions)

Updates the dimensions of the layout viewport. Usually called on window resize.

public static extern void SetLayoutDimensions(Dimensions dimensions)

Parameters

dimensions Dimensions

The new viewport width and height.

SetMaxElementCount(int)

Sets the maximum number of UI elements that can be stored in the layout tree. Must be configured to match structural complexities.

public static extern void SetMaxElementCount(int maxElementCount)

Parameters

maxElementCount int

The new maximum element capacity.

SetMaxMeasureTextCacheWordCount(int)

Sets the maximum capacity of the word cache used during text measurement.

public static extern void SetMaxMeasureTextCacheWordCount(int maxMeasureTextCacheWordCount)

Parameters

maxMeasureTextCacheWordCount int

The new cache word limit.

SetMeasureTextFunction(nint, void*)

Configures the callback function that Clay will invoke whenever it needs to calculate text sizing. This callback must be provided if the layout tree contains any text elements.

public static extern void SetMeasureTextFunction(nint measureTextFunction, void* userData)

Parameters

measureTextFunction nint

A function pointer matching the ClayNative.Clay_MeasureTextCallback signature.

userData void*

A custom data pointer that will be supplied to the measurement callback.

SetPointerState(Vector2, bool)

Updates Clay's pointer input state (e.g. mouse or touch pointer coordinates and button state).

public static void SetPointerState(Vector2 position, bool pointerDown)

Parameters

position Vector2

The current 2D screen coordinate of the pointer.

pointerDown bool

True if the primary pointer button is pressed; otherwise, false.

SetQueryScrollOffsetFunction(nint, void*)

Sets a custom callback to query scroll offsets if external scroll integration is desired.

public static extern void SetQueryScrollOffsetFunction(nint queryScrollOffsetFunction, void* userData)

Parameters

queryScrollOffsetFunction nint

A function pointer to the scroll querying function.

userData void*

A custom data pointer passed to the callback.

StoreTextElementConfig(TextElementConfig)

Low-level function: copies the text configuration into Clay's internal layout storage arena.

public static extern TextElementConfig* StoreTextElementConfig(TextElementConfig config)

Parameters

config TextElementConfig

The text configuration to store.

Returns

TextElementConfig*

A pointer to the persisted config within native memory.

UpdateScrollContainers(bool, Vector2, float)

Processes scroll movements for scrollable containers based on user actions.

public static void UpdateScrollContainers(bool enableDragScrolling, Vector2 scrollDelta, float deltaTime)

Parameters

enableDragScrolling bool

If true, allows users to click and drag to scroll.

scrollDelta Vector2

The scroll wheel or trackpad delta offset applied this frame.

deltaTime float

The time elapsed since the last frame in seconds.

Made with docfx
